title: FocusPlan Tasks
description: JSON Schema for FocusPlan task data. Defines the structure and constraints of the array returned by tasks.php and consumed by app.js.

id.description: Unique identifier generated from a Unix timestamp

subject.description: Subject or course the task belongs to

minutes.description: Estimated time to complete the task in minutes

status.description: Current status of the task — only these two values are allowed
